messages.content: recommend the best headphones in Nigeria

My guy, I got you. Based on your love for electronics, I'd recommend checking out the Sony WH-CH710N headphones. They're available on Jumia and Konga for around ₦80,000 - ₦100,000, depending on the seller. 

These headphones are a great choice because they're wireless, have good sound quality, and long battery life (up to 35 hours). Plus, they're noise-cancelling, which is perfect for Lagos' busy streets. 

If you're looking for something more affordable, you could consider the Anker Soundcore Space Q32 headphones, which are available on Slot for around ₦25,000 - ₦35,000. They're not as fancy as the Sonys, but they still offer great sound and decent noise-cancelling.

I considered your location in Lagos, so I made sure to suggest headphones that are available on popular Nigerian platforms and won't break the bank. Let me know if you have any other questions or if you'd like more options!
